title: Add comprehensive README and Quarto docs_src documentation for all v0.4 features

comments.author: driver--comprehensive-readme-and-quarto-docs-src-documentation
comments.content:
Plan: Comprehensive documentation overhaul covering all v0.4 features. The existing docs are solid but need expansion in several areas:

1. **README.md** - Already comprehensive, needs minor updates for swarm commands table format, preflight checks mention, and documentation links for new guides
2. **Quarto docs_src** - Needs 4 new guide pages:
   - guides/swarm.qmd - Swarm orchestration (init, plan, launch, gate, checkpoint, resume)
   - guides/knowledge.qmd - Knowledge management (add, show, list, edit, remove, search, sync)
   - guides/tui.qmd - Terminal UI dashboard guide
   - guides/container-agents.qmd - Container-based agent execution
3. **_quarto.yml** - Add new pages to navbar and sidebar
4. **index.qmd** - Add feature cards for TUI, Knowledge, Swarm, Container agents
5. **Existing guides** - Update multi-agent.qmd with SSH signing section, update commands.qmd with swarm/container/tui/preflight commands
6. **Reference** - Add kickoff-report.qmd to navbar (already exists but not linked)

Key decisions: Keep existing content stable, add new content additively. No restructuring.

comments.author: driver--comprehensive-readme-and-quarto-docs-src-documentation
comments.content: Decision: Created 4 new guide pages (swarm.qmd, knowledge.qmd, tui.qmd, container-agents.qmd) as standalone guides rather than expanding existing pages -- each feature is distinct enough to warrant its own page. Updated _quarto.yml, index.qmd, commands.qmd, multi-agent.qmd, hooks.qmd, hook-config.qmd, quickstart.qmd, and README.md with cross-references and expanded content.
